title: The Bizarre Esoteric Roots of Modern Space Programs

transcript.text: the Russian space program was inspired
by early rocket scientists like
Constantine seosi who had basically
constructed his own Cosmic religion or
worldview around space this included a
belief that humans would colonize the
Milky Way achieve immortality regulate
the forces of nature at will and
transition our biosphere into a new
sphere a mental Network he also believed
humans would achieve time travel his
American counterpart Jack Parson was
equally unb founded by convention he was
part of the Pasadena cult Otto along
with Scientology Creator elron hubard
the two would performed Sex Magic
rituals and Parsons even received a past
life regression in which he was Simon of
magus a Biblical character who used
black magic to levitate all of that is
to say maybe the true history of
American and Russian space programs is
Stranger than meets the eye
